ac_unit.name: Air Conditioner
ac_unit.recommendation: Set the thermostat 2 degrees higher to save up to 10% on energy and cooling emissions.

car.name: Gasoline Car
car.recommendation: Consider carpooling or taking public transit twice a week to drastically reduce your transport footprint.

burger.name: Beef Burger
burger.recommendation: Swap one beef meal a week for a plant-based alternative to cut dietary emissions.

avocado.name: Imported Avocado
avocado.recommendation: Try to buy locally sourced produce when in season to reduce air-freight and transport emissions.

duck.name: Plastic Rubber Duck
duck.recommendation: Support brands that make toys and products from recycled ocean plastics or biodegradable materials.

waterbottle.name: Single-Use Plastic Bottle
waterbottle.recommendation: Switching to a reusable metal or glass bottle prevents hundreds of single-use plastics from reaching landfills.
